miwi        2011-06-25 07:05:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-asn1-modules Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a small but growing collection of ASN.1 data structures expressed in
  Python terms using pyasn1 data model.
  
  WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/pyasn1/
  
  PR:             ports/155715
  Submitted by:   Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src at yandex.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4391    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/py-asn1-modules/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/py-asn1-modules/pkg-plist (new)
